AI.title: Some Musk v. Altman Jurors Don't Like Elon Musk
AI.summary: Musk’s lawsuit challenges OpenAI’s evolution under Sam Altman. But during jury selection, several potential jurors voiced negative views of Musk himself.

游戏.title: Helldivers 2 Dev Promises Action and Communication After Players Deliver 'Fair' and 'Painful' Criticism During Reddit AMA
游戏.summary: Arrowhead said it has heard the "fair" but "painful to read" criticisms from the Helldivers 2 community and has made the promise to take action with more frequent communication in the future.

游戏.title: Gerry Conway, Punisher Co-Creator and Spider-Man Writer, Dies at 73
游戏.summary: Legendary comic book writer Gerry Conway, whose co-creations include The Punisher, Firestorm, Ms. Marvel, and former Robin Jason Todd, has died at 73.

游戏.title: Django/Zorro Crossover Movie Based on Quentin Tarantino Comic Book in the Works at Sony
游戏.summary: A crossover movie based on the Django/Zorro comic book co-written by Quentin Tarantino and Matt Wagner is reportedly in development.

游戏.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day Marvel Legends Figures Reveal Savage Hulk’s MCU Return
游戏.summary: Hasbro's upcoming Marvel Legends figures give us a better idea of what to expect from Spider-Man: Brand New Day, including the return of Savage Hulk to the MCU.

游戏.title: Disney Reimagined and Animated Songs From Frozen 2, Moana 2, and Encanto in American Sign Language for National Deaf History Month
游戏.summary: In celebration of National Deaf History Month, Disney+ has debuted Disney Animation's Songs in Sign Language, which reimagined and animated Frozen 2's 'The Next Right Thing,' Moana 2's 'Beyond,' and Encanto's 'We Don't Talk About Bruno' with American Sign Language (ASL).

游戏.title: The Boys Season 5, Episode 5 Video Teases a Supernatural Reunion and an Up Close View of Homelander's Ass
游戏.summary: With The Boys nearing its conclusion, Prime Video has released a teaser video for this week’s episode, confirming the introduction of two new characters with just a few episodes left of the entire series. Oh, and we also get a closer look at Homelander's ass than anyone asked for.

游戏.title: Resident Evil 2 Director Hideki Kamiya Confirms Leon S. Kennedy Is Named After 1994 Movie Leon: The Professional
游戏.summary: After nearly 30 years of speculation, Resident Evil 2 director Hideki Kamiya has confirmed that, yes, Leon S. Kennedy is named after the Léon: The Professional movie.

游戏.title: For the Steam Machine, Valve Is Waiting for the Price to Be Right
Valve Confirms Steam Controller Price and Release Date, Promises More News on Steam Machine Soon
游戏.summary: Valve has confirmed the Steam Controller price and release date, while promising to announce news on the hotly anticipated Steam Machine soon.

游戏.title: Valve Says It's 'Hard at Work' on Steam Deck 2, but There's Still No Release Window
游戏.summary: Valve has said it’s “hard at work” on Steam Deck 2, while continuing to work on getting the Steam Machine, Steam Controller, and Steam Frame out the door.

游戏.title: Ubisoft Plays Down Report of Assassin's Creed Hexe Staff Leaving Project
游戏.summary: Ubisoft has responded to a report that suggested 50 staff members had recently been moved from their work on the upcoming Assassin's Creed Hexe — and that their jobs had now potentially been left at risk.

游戏.title: Resident Evil Requiem Sales Prompt Capcom to Raise Profit Forecast
游戏.summary: The success of Resident Evil Requiem means Capcom is raising its earning forecast for the year.

游戏.title: Arc Raiders Riven Tides Trailer Reveals Massive Beach-Themed Update With New Seaside Map and Turbine Enemy
游戏.summary: Embark has revealed a first look at the new Riven Tides map, the Arc Turbine enemy, and everything else included in what looks like the biggest Arc Raiders update yet.

游戏.title: Jackass: Best and Last Trailer Features New Creatively Painful Stunts and a Brief Look at Bam Margera in Previously Unseen Footage
游戏.summary: The first trailer for Jackass: Best and Last has arrived with a sneak peek at Johnny Knoxville and the gang setting up new stunts like the "Escape Room from Hell" while reliving some of their most painful memories.

游戏.title: James Gunn Explains Why The Authority Fell by the Wayside: 'It Didn't Work in Terms of the Larger DCU'
游戏.summary: DC Universe chief James Gunn has insisted TV series Booster Gold and Paradise Lost are still alive, but confirmed The Authority movie has fallen by the wayside.

科技.title: Drizzle on top: a new high-end dog food brand is coming for the 1%
科技.summary: Golden Child is launching with two "five-star" products: a fresh frozen meal system and, more intriguingly, a "drizzle." It has also raised $37 million in funding.

科技.title: India’s Snabbit closes $56M round as investor interest in on-demand home services heats up
科技.summary: Snabbit now processes over 40,000 daily jobs and has cut costs sharply as it expands across cities and services.

科技.title: Letterboxd, the social platform for film buffs, reportedly looking for new owner
科技.summary: Potential buyers of Letterboxd include Versant, the parent company of CNBC and MS NOW, and Hollywood media company The Ankler, according to Semafor.

科技.title: Consumers lost $2.1B to social media scams in 2025, FTC reports
科技.summary: The agency reports that losses from social media scams have increased eightfold and that social media scams resulted in higher losses than any other method scammers used to contact consumers.

科技.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
科技.summary: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

科技.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
科技.summary: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

科技.title: Hacker who allegedly carried out cyberattacks for China is extradited to US
科技.summary: Xu Zewei is accused of participating in a Chinese government hacking group that broke into thousands of U.S. organizations and stole COVID-19-related research.

科技.title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
科技.summary: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

科技.title: Data center demand drives 66% surge in natural gas power plant costs
科技.summary: Natural gas power plant costs have nearly doubled in two years and take 23% longer to build as data center electricity demand skyrockets.

科技.title: What’s behind Europe’s efforts to ditch US software in favor of sovereign tech
科技.summary: Governments across Europe are looking to rely less on American tech providers.

科技.title: China blocks Meta’s $2B Manus deal after months-long probe
科技.summary: China has ordered Meta to unwind its multibillion-dollar Manus acquisition, dealing a potential setback to Zuckerberg’s push into AI agents.

科技.title: OpenAI could be making a phone with AI agents replacing apps
科技.summary: There have been plenty of rumors about OpenAI's hardware plans, which involve launching a pair of earbuds. A new note from industry analyst Ming-Chi Kuo suggests that the AI company might be working on a phone in collaboration with MediaTek, Qualcomm, and Luxshare.

科技.title: Critical infrastructure giant Itron says it was hacked
科技.summary: The American technology giant provides water and energy monitoring and utility meters to hundreds of millions of homes and businesses.

科技.title: Spotify’s next frontier: Fitness content
科技.summary: Spotify is adding fitness as its next major category, launching workout videos, playlists, and Peloton classes inside the app for free and Premium users.

科技.title: Meta inks deal for solar power at night, beamed from space
科技.summary: Overview Energy's first contract with Meta is a small step toward a future of space-based solar power.
